mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_pending_approval (approval_id, run_id, request_id, conversation_id, resolved_workspace, workspace_display_name, tool, input_json, permission_level, risk_reason, operation_preview, diff_json, policy_fingerprint, metadata_json, context_json, created_at, expires_at, consumed) VALUES (#{approvalId}, #{runId}, #{requestId}, #{conversationId}, #{resolvedWorkspace}, #{workspaceDisplayName}, #{tool}, #{inputJson}, #{permissionLevel}, #{riskReason}, #{operationPreview}, #{diffJson}, #{policyFingerprint}, #{metadataJson}, #{contextJson}, #{createdAt}, #{expiresAt}, #{consumed}) ON CONFLICT(approval_id) DO UPDATE SET run_id = excluded.run_id, request_id = excluded.request_id, conversation_id = excluded.conversation_id, resolved_workspace = excluded.resolved_workspace, workspace_display_name = excluded.workspace_display_name, tool = excluded.tool, input_json = excluded.input_json, permission_level = excluded.permission_level, risk_reason = excluded.risk_reason, operation_preview = excluded.operation_preview, diff_json = excluded.diff_json, policy_fingerprint = excluded.policy_fingerprint, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, context_json = excluded.context_json, created_at = excluded.created_at, expires_at = excluded.expires_at, consumed = excluded.consumed, update_time = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_pending_approval WHERE approval_id = #{approvalId} LIMIT 1
